epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Intro incoming (sorry for the 6 month delay)…. What’s the best email? How are you going? Big game tomorrow
Hey mate, I’m in a meeting. Chat after 20-30mins
I’ll be working at that time - crack on (and just in case not aware it’s Martin as PWP - I’m ‘just’ the wife!)

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).
Documents for lawyer documents for accountant
Redesign redesign with a more human feel that's gonna affect the video and the deck as well
Lawyers BB send the finalised docs

lead.headline: Your lawyer needs finalized documents before moving forward.
lead.deck: Multiple tasks point to pending legal paperwork that's blocking progress—both the lawyer's docs and accountant materials remain outstanding. Getting these submitted clears the path for whatever comes next.
